title: Thiol redox proteomics: Characterization of thiol-based post-translational modifications.
author: Li X Gluth A Zhang T Qian WJ
content: S-EPMC10764013 PMC10764013 Thiol redox proteomics: Characterization of thiol-based post-translational modifications. Redox post-translational modifications on cysteine thiols (redox PTMs) have profound effects on protein structure and function, thus enabling regulation of various biological
